content.section: Destroyer is a tier 3 tank that can be selected upon reaching level 30 using "Machine Gun", and at level 45, can be upgraded into "Hybrid", "Annihilator", "Skimmer", "Rocketeer", "Glider" and "Firework".

- Use the high recoil to your advantage to dodge attacks and retreat quickly if needed.
- Using the "flicking" technique makes it hard for other players to know where you're aiming.
- Move vertically so ememies have less time to react.
- Get close to enemies before you shoot for a greater chance of killing, then retreat out of their fov to ambush again if they survived.

- Back in the early days of Diep.io, there was a bug that allowed the Machine Gun to upgrade into itself. The higher tiered versions of Machine Gun were referred to as Machine Gun II and Machine Gun III at tiers 3 and 4 respectively. These versions of Machine Gun had not changed from their original tank in terms of design whatsoever. Since at the time, the Machine Gun could upgrade into both itself and Destroyer, the tier 3 variant of Machine Gun could also upgrade into a variant of Destroyer. This Level 45 version was given the name "Mega Destroyer" by players, but was entirely identical to Destroyer. Machine Gun II was removed on May 24th 2016, taking Machine Gun III and Mega Destroyer along with it.
